name: Problem Children Are Coming from Another World, Aren't They?
original_name: 問題児たちが異世界から来るそうですよ?
overview: Three problem children - Izayoi Sakamaki, Asuka Kudou, and You Kasukabe - suddenly receive an invitation to another world known as "Little Garden" from a girl called Black Rabbit. Battles, laughter, sex appeal... anything goes in this new tale of adventure!

trailers.title: Problem Children Are Coming From Another World, Aren't They? Official Trailer AUS
